0.content:
# 👤 Active Directory — Account Changes Audit
Traces who last updated an Active Directory account and what changes were made. Covers account creation (4720), modification (4738), enable (4722), disable (4725), and deletion (4726).

2.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4720")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| summarize event_count = count()

4.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4738")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| summarize event_count = count()

6.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4722")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| summarize event_count = count()

8.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4725")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| summarize event_count = count()

10.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4726")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| summarize event_count = count()

14.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4720")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| parse content, """DATA 'Account Name:\t\t' DATA:PerformedBy EOL
DATA 'Account Domain:\t\t' DATA:PerformedByDomain EOL
DATA 'Logon ID:\t\t' DATA:LogonID EOL
DATA 'Account Name:\t\t' DATA:NewAccount EOL
DATA 'Account Domain:\t\t' DATA:NewAccountDomain EOL"""
| fields timestamp, host.name, PerformedBy, NewAccount, NewAccountDomain
| filterOut contains(PerformedBy, "$")
| sort timestamp desc

16.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4738")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| parse content, """DATA 'Account Name:\t\t' DATA:PerformedBy EOL
DATA 'Account Domain:\t\t' DATA:PerformedByDomain EOL
DATA 'Logon ID:\t\t' DATA:LogonID EOL
DATA 'Account Name:\t\t' DATA:TargetAccount EOL
DATA 'Account Domain:\t\t' DATA:TargetDomain EOL"""
| fields timestamp, host.name, PerformedBy, TargetAccount, TargetDomain, content
| filterOut contains(PerformedBy, "$")
| sort timestamp desc

18.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4725")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| parse content, """DATA 'Account Name:		' DATA:PerformedBy EOL
DATA 'Account Domain:		' DATA:PerformedByDomain EOL
DATA 'Logon ID:\t\t' DATA:LogonID EOL
DATA 'Account Name:\t\t' DATA:NewAccount EOL
"""
| fields timestamp, host.name, PerformedBy, AccountDisabled = NewAccount
//, NewAccountDomain
//, content
| filterOut contains(PerformedBy, "$")
| sort timestamp desc

20.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4726")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| parse content, """DATA 'Account Name:\t\t' DATA:PerformedBy EOL
DATA 'Account Domain:\t\t' DATA:PerformedByDomain EOL
DATA 'Logon ID:\t\t' DATA:LogonID EOL
DATA 'Account Name:\t\t' DATA:TargetAccount EOL
DATA 'Account Domain:\t\t' DATA:TargetDomain EOL"""
| fields timestamp, host.name, PerformedBy, TargetAccount, TargetDomain
| filterOut contains(PerformedBy, "$")
| sort timestamp desc
